add-text-annotation-to-page-3.title: Add Text Annotation to Page 3 of PDF
add-text-annotation-to-page-3.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, verifying it has at least three pages, and adding a yellow text annotation with a note icon to page three before saving the document.

create-popup-annotation-linked-to-highli.title: Create Popup Annotation Linked to Highlight in PDF
create-popup-annotation-linked-to-highli.description: Demonstrates how to add a highlight annotation and a linked popup note to the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-free-text-annotation-arial.title: Add Free‑Text Annotation with Arial Font to PDF
add-free-text-annotation-arial.description: Demonstrates how to add a free‑text annotation with Arial, 12‑point font to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-callout-to-freetext-annotation.title: Add Callout Leader Line to Free Text Annotation
add-callout-to-freetext-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to create a free‑text annotation with a callout (leader line) on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

hide-freetext-annotation-page-five.title: Hide Free‑Text Annotation on Specific PDF Page
hide-freetext-annotation-page-five.description: Shows how to make a FreeTextAnnotation invisible on page 5 of a PDF while preserving its data by adding a HideAction to the annotation.

add-yellow-highlight-annotation.title: Add Yellow Highlight Annotation to PDF
add-yellow-highlight-annotation.description: Loads a PDF, creates a HighlightAnnotation on the first page, sets its color to yellow and opacity to 80%, adds it to the page, and saves the modified document.

set-underline-annotation-opacity-50.title: Set Underline Annotation Opacity to 50%
set-underline-annotation-opacity-50.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, locating underline annotations on a specific page, and changing their opacity to 50% using Aspose.Pdf.

set-author-strikethrough-annotation.title: Set Author for Strikethrough Annotation
set-author-strikethrough-annotation.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a StrikeOutAnnotation, setting its author via the Title property, adding it to a page, and saving the document.

delete-annotation-by-id-from-pdf-page.title: Delete Annotation by Id from PDF Page
delete-annotation-by-id-from-pdf-page.description: Shows how to locate an annotation using its Name (unique Id) on the second page of a PDF and delete it with Aspose.Pdf.

remove-annotations-from-page.title: Remove All Annotations from a Specific PDF Page
remove-annotations-from-page.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access the third page, clear all its annotations, and save the modified document.

retrieve-annotation-types-page-four.title: Retrieve Annotation Types from Page Four
retrieve-annotation-types-page-four.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, accessing page 4, enumerating its annotations, and printing each annotation's type to the console.

update-annotation-position-by-id.title: Update Annotation Position by Id in PDF
update-annotation-position-by-id.description: Loads a PDF, searches all pages for an annotation with a specific Name, changes its rectangle coordinates, and saves the updated document.

import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf.title: Import XFDF Annotations into a PDF
import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, import annotations from an XFDF string using a memory stream, and save the updated document.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, export all its annotations to an XFDF file, and save the XFDF alongside the original PDF.

import-annotations-from-fdf.title: Import Annotations from FDF into PDF
import-annotations-from-fdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, read annotation data from an FDF file, import those annotations into the PDF, optionally enumerate them, and save the updated document.

batch-add-text-annotations-to-pdf-pages.title: Batch Add Text Annotations to All PDF Pages
batch-add-text-annotations-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to iterate through every page of a PDF document and add a text annotation with a title, contents, color, and icon using Aspose.Pdf.

highlight-keyword-occurrences-in-pdf.title: Highlight Keyword Occurrences in PDF
highlight-keyword-occurrences-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to search for a specific word on each page of a PDF and add a semi‑transparent yellow highlight annotation to every occurrence using Aspose.Pdf.

add-figure-annotations-custom-line-width.title: Add Figure Annotations with Custom Line Width and Color
add-figure-annotations-custom-line-width.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically add square figure annotations with a specified border color and line width to selected pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Batch Export PDF Annotations to XFDF Files
batch-export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files in a folder and export each document's annotations to a separate XFDF file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-xfdf-annotations-into-multiple-pd.title: Import XFDF Annotations into Multiple PDFs in Parallel
import-xfdf-annotations-into-multiple-pd.description: Shows how to import annotations from an XFDF file into several PDF documents simultaneously using Parallel.ForEach and Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf__v2.title: Export PDF Annotations and Appearance Streams to XFDF
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf__v2.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF document and exporting all its annotations, including appearance streams, to an XFDF file using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-xfdf-annotation-count.title: Validate XFDF Annotation Count per PDF Page
validate-xfdf-annotation-count.description: Loads a PDF, imports annotations from an XFDF file, and checks that each page contains the expected number of annotations.

export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf.title: Export and Re‑Import PDF Annotations via XFDF
export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf.description: Demonstrates exporting all annotations from a PDF to an XFDF file, removing them, then importing them back to verify that the annotation count remains unchanged.

list-annotation-ids-to-csv.title: List Annotation IDs per PDF Page and Export to CSV
list-annotation-ids-to-csv.description: The example opens a PDF, iterates through each page's annotations, extracts their IDs (Name or FullName), and writes the page number and ID to a CSV file.

filter-pdf-annotations-by-author.title: Filter PDF Annotations by Author
filter-pdf-annotations-by-author.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page's markup annotations, removes those whose author (Title) does not match the current user, and saves the filtered document.

add-strikethrough-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Strikethrough Annotation to PDF Paragraph
add-strikethrough-annotation-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a strike‑out (strikethrough) annotation to a specific paragraph in a PDF and set its author to a reviewer using Aspose.Pdf.

generate-annotation-summary-per-pdf-page.title: Generate Annotation Summary per PDF Page
generate-annotation-summary-per-pdf-page.description: The example loads a PDF, iterates through each page, counts the different annotation types present, and writes a JSON summary file.

add-polyline-figure-annotation.title: Add Polyline Figure Annotation to PDF
add-polyline-figure-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to create a custom polyline figure annotation, set its visual properties, and add it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-arrow-line-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Arrow Line Annotation to PDF
add-arrow-line-annotation-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a line annotation with an arrow ending on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

import-annotations-from-fdf__v2.title: Import Annotations from FDF into PDF
import-annotations-from-fdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to read annotation data from an FDF file and apply it to the corresponding pages of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

recolor-highlight-annotations.title: Recolor Highlight Annotations to Light Green
recolor-highlight-annotations.description: Shows how to iterate through all pages of a PDF and change the color of every highlight annotation to light green using Aspose.Pdf.

retrieve-annotation-bounding-rectangle.title: Retrieve Annotation Bounding Rectangle
retrieve-annotation-bounding-rectangle.description: Shows how to load a PDF, get the first annotation on the first page, obtain its bounding rectangle (with rotation taken into account), and log the rectangle coordinates.

add-multiline-freetext-annotation.title: Add Multiline Free‑Text Annotation with 1.5 Line Spacing
add-multiline-freetext-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to place a free‑text annotation with multiple lines on a PDF page and control its line spacing (1.5) using RichText CSS.

add-highlight-annotation-70-opacity.title: Add Highlight Annotation with 70% Opacity
add-highlight-annotation-70-opacity.description: Demonstrates how to add a highlight annotation to a PDF page and set its opacity to 70% for subtle emphasis.

add-popup-annotation-to-text-annotation.title: Add Popup Annotation to a Text Annotation
add-popup-annotation-to-text-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to create a sticky‑note (TextAnnotation) in a PDF and attach a PopupAnnotation that shows additional notes when the parent annotation is selected.

import-xfdf-annotations-reassign-pages.title: Import XFDF Annotations and Reassign to Specific Pages
import-xfdf-annotations-reassign-pages.description: Demonstrates importing annotations from an XFDF file into a PDF and moving them to target pages based on a name‑to‑page mapping dictionary.

remove-popup-annotations.title: Remove Popup Annotations While Keeping Parent Markup
remove-popup-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to delete all popup annotations from each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf while leaving the associated markup annotations intact.

generate-annotation-report.title: Generate Annotation Report by Type
generate-annotation-report.description: The example reads a PDF, groups its annotations by their AnnotationType, and creates a new PDF that lists the count of each annotation type for reporting purposes.

add-figure-annotation-external-image.title: Add Figure Annotation with External Image
add-figure-annotation-external-image.description: Demonstrates how to create a figure (file attachment) annotation in a PDF that references an external image file as its appearance, and then saves the updated document.

export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf__v2.title: Export and Import PDF Annotations via XFDF
export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf__v2.description: Shows how to export annotations from a source PDF to an XFDF file and then import those annotations into another PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-add-text-annotation-first-page.title: Batch Add Text Annotation to First Page of PDFs
batch-add-text-annotation-first-page.description: Shows how to process all PDF files in a folder, add a standard text annotation to the first page of each document, and save the annotated PDFs to an output directory.

modify-figure-annotation-color.title: Modify Figure Annotation Appearance Stream Color
modify-figure-annotation-color.description: Shows how to access the appearance dictionary of figure annotations (Square and Circle) and programmatically change their border and interior colors.

delete-pdf-annotations-using-csv.title: Delete PDF Annotations Based on CSV Identifiers
delete-pdf-annotations-using-csv.description: Shows how to load a list of annotation names from a CSV file and remove matching annotations from each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-free-text-annotation-with-background.title: Add Free Text Annotation with Light Gray Background
add-free-text-annotation-with-background.description: Loads a PDF document, creates a free‑text annotation with a light gray background and border, adds it to the first page, and saves the updated file.

set-figure-annotation-line-thickness.title: Set Figure Annotation Line Thickness to 2 Points
set-figure-annotation-line-thickness.description: Demonstrates how to add a square figure annotation to a PDF page and set its border width to 2 points for clearer visualization.

extract-popup-annotation-to-pdf.title: Extract Popup Annotation Text to a New PDF
extract-popup-annotation-to-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, finds the first popup annotation, extracts its textual content, and saves that content into a separate PDF document.

add-free-text-annotation-with-callout.title: Add Free‑Text Annotation with Callout to PDF
add-free-text-annotation-with-callout.description: Demonstrates how to create a free‑text annotation with a callout line, customize its appearance, and add it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-and-uploa.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF and Upload to Azure Blob
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-and-uploa.description: Shows how to export annotations from a PDF to an XFDF stream using Aspose.Pdf and then upload the XFDF file to Azure Blob Storage (or a local stub).

add-rounded-rectangle-annotation-around-.title: Add Rounded Rectangle Annotation Around Table
add-rounded-rectangle-annotation-around-.description: The example loads a PDF, defines a rectangle that represents a table area, creates a square (figure) annotation with a border around it, adds the annotation to the first page, and saves the modified document.

retrieve-annotation-ids-page-numbers.title: Retrieve Annotation IDs and Their Page Numbers
retrieve-annotation-ids-page-numbers.description: The example loads a PDF, iterates through all pages and annotations, extracts each annotation's identifier and page number, and builds a dictionary for quick lookup.

remove-highlight-annotations-from-pdf.title: Remove Highlight Annotations from PDF
remove-highlight-annotations-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, detect highlight annotations, delete them, and save the resulting document.

export-popup-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Export Popup Annotations to XFDF
export-popup-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Shows how to retain only popup annotations in a PDF and export them to an XFDF file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-annotations-from-fdf__v3.title: Import Annotations from FDF into PDF
import-annotations-from-fdf__v3.description: Shows how to load a PDF, read annotations from an FDF file, and automatically assign them to the appropriate pages using Aspose.Pdf.

add-transparent-free-text-annotation.title: Add Transparent Free‑Text Annotation to PDF
add-transparent-free-text-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a free‑text annotation with a transparent background and optional border removal on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

set-line-ending-styles-for-pdf-line-anno.title: Set Line Ending Styles for a PDF Line Annotation
set-line-ending-styles-for-pdf-line-anno.description: Demonstrates how to create a line annotation in a PDF and set its start and end line ending styles (circle and open arrow) using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-highlight-annotation-color.title: Replace Highlight Annotation Color in PDF
replace-highlight-annotation-color.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over all highlight annotations, changes each annotation's color to a custom shade, and saves the modified document.

batch-add-popup-annotations.title: Batch Add Popup Annotations to Text Annotations
batch-add-popup-annotations.description: Shows how to iterate through each page of a PDF, locate TextAnnotation objects, create matching PopupAnnotation objects, link them to their parents, and save the modified file.

import-xfdf-annotations-set-visibility.title: Import XFDF Annotations and Set Visibility by User Role
import-xfdf-annotations-set-visibility.description: Demonstrates how to import annotations from an XFDF file into a PDF and adjust their visibility based on the current user's role, using Aspose.Pdf.

add-polyline-figure-annotation__v2.title: Add Polyline Figure Annotation to PDF
add-polyline-figure-annotation__v2.description: Demonstrates how to create a polyline figure annotation by defining vertices, computing a bounding rectangle, and adding it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-magenta-underline-annotation.title: Add Magenta Underline Annotation with Custom Thickness
add-magenta-underline-annotation.description: Shows how to insert an underline annotation on a PDF page, set its color to magenta, and define a 2‑point line thickness using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-highlight-annotation-image-repor.title: Extract Highlight Annotation as Image and Embed in PDF Report
extract-highlight-annotation-image-repor.description: The example finds the first highlight annotation in a source PDF, renders the highlighted area to a PNG image stream, and embeds that image into a new PDF report.

set-callout-leader-line-length.title: Set Callout Leader Line Length for Free‑Text Annotation
set-callout-leader-line-length.description: Shows how to create a free‑text annotation with a callout leader line exactly 20 points long using Aspose.Pdf.

export-annotations-xfdf-upload.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF and Upload via REST
export-annotations-xfdf-upload.description: Demonstrates how to export all annotations from a PDF to an XFDF file using Aspose.Pdf and then upload the XFDF file to a REST API endpoint with HttpClient.

import-consolidate-annotations-from-fdf.title: Import and Consolidate Annotations from Multiple FDF Files
import-consolidate-annotations-from-fdf.description: The example loads a PDF, reads annotations from several FDF files, adds them to the document, aggregates all annotations into a list, and saves the consolidated PDF.

add-popup-annotation-with-custom-size.title: Add Popup Annotation with Custom Size and Position
add-popup-annotation-with-custom-size.description: Demonstrates creating a parent TextAnnotation and an associated PopupAnnotation with custom dimensions, positioning the popup relative to its parent, and saving the PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-figure-annotation-border-color-dark-.title: Set Figure Annotation Border Color to Dark Gray
set-figure-annotation-border-color-dark-.description: Shows how to change the border color of all figure annotations (square, circle, polygon, polyline) in a PDF to dark gray using Aspose.Pdf.

generate-csv-audit-report-of-pdf-annotat.title: Generate CSV Audit Report of PDF Annotations
generate-csv-audit-report-of-pdf-annotat.description: The example loads a PDF, iterates through all pages and annotations, extracts each annotation's name and author (title), and writes the data to a UTF-8 CSV file for auditing.

add-highlight-annotation-with-custom-opa.title: Add Highlight Annotation with Custom Opacity to PDF
add-highlight-annotation-with-custom-opa.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a highlight annotation with a defined rectangle and 50% opacity, adding it to a page, and saving the modified document.

delete-pdf-annotations-restore-xfdf.title: Delete All PDF Annotations and Restore from XFDF
delete-pdf-annotations-restore-xfdf.description: The example removes every annotation from a PDF document and then re‑imports them from an XFDF backup file, saving the updated PDF.

set-highlight-annotation-opacity.title: Set Highlight Annotation Opacity to 60%
set-highlight-annotation-opacity.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page's highlight annotations, set their opacity to 60%, and save the updated document.

add-video-screen-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Video Screen Annotation to PDF Page
add-video-screen-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a ScreenAnnotation that references a video file, placing it on page three, and saving the updated document.

add-sound-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Sound Annotation to PDF
add-sound-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a SoundAnnotation that plays an MP3 file when the annotation area is clicked and save the updated PDF.

create-richmedia-flash-video.title: Create RichMedia Annotation with Flash Video
create-richmedia-flash-video.description: Demonstrates how to add a RichMedia annotation containing a Flash video to the first page of a PDF and configure its activation and playback settings.

add-3d-annotation-u3d-page-two.title: Add 3D Annotation with U3D Model and Set Initial View on Page Two
add-3d-annotation-u3d-page-two.description: Demonstrates how to embed a U3D 3‑D model as a PDF3DAnnotation on the second page of a PDF and set its initial view.

retrieve-first-richmediaannotation-page-.title: Retrieve First RichMediaAnnotation from Page 5
retrieve-first-richmediaannotation-page-.description: Loads a PDF, checks for the existence of page 5, and uses a LINQ query to obtain the first RichMediaAnnotation on that page, then prints its key properties.

remove-sound-annotations-from-pdf.title: Remove All Sound Annotations from a PDF
remove-sound-annotations-from-pdf.description: Shows how to iterate through each page of a PDF and delete every SoundAnnotation using Aspose.Pdf.

add-javascript-button-annotation-to-pdf-.title: Add JavaScript Button Annotation to PDF Page
add-javascript-button-annotation-to-pdf-.description: Demonstrates how to create a push button on page four of a PDF and attach a JavaScript action that shows an alert when the button is clicked, then saves the modified document.

create-button-annotation-go-to-page-10.title: Create Button Annotation to Jump to Page 10
create-button-annotation-go-to-page-10.description: Demonstrates adding a button annotation to a PDF that navigates to page 10 of the same document when activated, using Aspose.Pdf.

add-watermark-annotation-page-six.title: Add Watermark Annotation with Opacity to Page Six
add-watermark-annotation-page-six.description: Demonstrates how to insert a WatermarkAnnotation with 30% opacity at the center of the sixth page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-text-watermark-annotation.title: Add Text Watermark Annotation to PDF Pages
add-text-watermark-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a bold "Confidential" text watermark annotation to the top of each page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

reuse-ximage-across-multiple-pdf-pages.title: Reuse XImage Across Multiple PDF Pages
reuse-ximage-across-multiple-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to add an image once to a PDF's resources and reuse the same XImage object on every page, reducing file size.

add-background-image-artifact-to-pdf-pag.title: Add Background Image Artifact to PDF Page
add-background-image-artifact-to-pdf-pag.description: Demonstrates how to create a BackgroundArtifact from an image file and attach it to a specific PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-bates-numbering-with-prefix-six-digi.title: Add Bates Numbering with Prefix and Six-Digit Format to PDF
add-bates-numbering-with-prefix-six-digi.description: Demonstrates how to add Bates numbering to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, setting a custom prefix and a six‑digit number format.

count-watermark-artifacts-on-pdf-page.title: Count Watermark Artifacts on a PDF Page
count-watermark-artifacts-on-pdf-page.description: Shows how to load a PDF, access a specific page, and count the WatermarkArtifact objects present in its Artifacts collection.

set-watermark-artifact-opacity.title: Set Watermark Artifact Opacity to 50%
set-watermark-artifact-opacity.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page to locate WatermarkArtifact objects, changes their opacity to 50%, and saves the modified document.

export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf__v3.title: Export and Import PDF Annotations via XFDF
export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf__v3.description: Shows how to export annotations from a source PDF to an XFDF file and then import that XFDF into another PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

import-fdf-annotations-merge-pdf.title: Import FDF Annotations and Merge into PDF
import-fdf-annotations-merge-pdf.description: Shows how to read form field annotations from an FDF file and merge them into an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-add-screen-annotations-to-pdf.title: Batch Add Video Screen Annotations to PDF Pages
batch-add-screen-annotations-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a multi‑page PDF, create a ScreenAnnotation with a different video file for each page, and save the updated document using Aspose.PDF.

remove-background-artifacts-from-pdf.title: Remove Background Artifacts from All PDF Pages
remove-background-artifacts-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through each page, locate BackgroundArtifact objects, delete them, and save the resulting document.

add-link-annotation-external-url.title: Add Link Annotation with External URL to PDF
add-link-annotation-external-url.description: Demonstrates how to create a link annotation on a PDF page that opens an external web URL when clicked, and saves the resulting document.

add-internal-link-annotation.title: Add Internal Link Annotation to PDF
add-internal-link-annotation.description: Shows how to create a link annotation that jumps to a specific page within the same PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-sound-annotation-to-every-pdf-page.title: Add Sound Annotation to Every PDF Page
add-sound-annotation-to-every-pdf-page.description: Shows how to loop through all pages of a PDF document and attach a SoundAnnotation that plays a notification tone on each page load.

add-auto-play-rich-media-annotation.title: Add Auto‑Play Rich Media Annotation to PDF
add-auto-play-rich-media-annotation.description: Demonstrates embedding a video as a RichMediaAnnotation in a PDF and configuring it to play automatically when the page becomes visible.

clone-watermark-annotation-across-pdf-pa.title: Clone Watermark Annotation Across PDF Pages
clone-watermark-annotation-across-pdf-pa.description: Shows how to find a WatermarkAnnotation on the first page, clone it with offset positions, and add the cloned annotations to the remaining pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf__v3.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF In-Memory
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf__v3.description: Shows how to create a PDF with a text annotation entirely in memory and export only the annotation data to an XFDF stream without saving the full document to disk.

import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf__v2.title: Import XFDF Annotations into PDF
import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, import annotations from an XFDF file while preserving the existing page layout, and save the updated document.

button-calculate-sum-form-fields.title: Create Button Annotation with JavaScript to Sum Form Fields
button-calculate-sum-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to add number, text, and button form fields to a PDF and attach a JavaScript action to the button that calculates the sum of two fields and displays the result.

add-rich-media-video-annotation.title: Add Rich Media Video Annotation with Streamed Content
add-rich-media-video-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to embed an online video as a RichMediaAnnotation in a PDF, streaming the video from a URL and preventing download by marking the annotation read‑only.

create-3d-annotation-custom-lighting.title: Create 3D Annotation with Custom Lighting
create-3d-annotation-custom-lighting.description: Demonstrates embedding a U3D/PRC 3‑D model into a PDF as a 3‑D annotation and applying a custom lighting scheme and render mode to enhance visual depth.

iterate-pdf-annotations-log-details.title: Iterate PDF Annotations and Log Details
iterate-pdf-annotations-log-details.description: Opens a PDF document, walks through each page's annotation collection, and writes the annotation type, rectangle coordinates, and a placeholder for any associated media file to the console.

replace-background-artifact-image.title: Replace Background Artifact Image with High-Resolution Version
replace-background-artifact-image.description: Shows how to find BackgroundArtifact objects in a PDF and replace their image with a higher‑resolution file without altering the page layout.

add-dynamic-date-watermark-annotation.title: Add Dynamic Date Watermark Annotation to PDF Pages
add-dynamic-date-watermark-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a WatermarkAnnotation containing a runtime‑generated date string (and page number) to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-link-annotation-open-embedded-pdf.title: Create Link Annotation to Open Embedded PDF Attachment
create-link-annotation-open-embedded-pdf.description: Shows how to embed a PDF file into another PDF and add a link annotation that launches the embedded attachment when clicked.

set-dashed-border-for-button-annotations.title: Set Dashed Border for PDF Button Annotations
set-dashed-border-for-button-annotations.description: Shows how to iterate through a PDF document, locate button field annotations, and apply a dashed border with a 2‑point thickness using Aspose.Pdf.

add-looping-video-screen-annotation.title: Add Looping Video Screen Annotation to PDF
add-looping-video-screen-annotation.description: Shows how to embed a video file in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's ScreenAnnotation, set a title and contents, and save the document.

extract-watermark-artifacts-report.title: Extract Watermark Artifacts and Generate Report
extract-watermark-artifacts-report.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page's artifacts, identifies WatermarkArtifact objects, and writes their positions and opacity values to a text report.

create-submit-button-with-javascript.title: Create Submit Button with JavaScript in PDF
create-submit-button-with-javascript.description: Demonstrates how to add a push‑button field to a PDF and attach a JavaScript action that submits the form data to a specified HTTP endpoint.

add-rich-media-annotation-hidden-toolbar.title: Add Rich Media Annotation with Hidden Toolbar to PDF
add-rich-media-annotation-hidden-toolbar.description: Demonstrates embedding a video as a RichMediaAnnotation in a PDF and hiding the playback toolbar using custom flash variables.

batch-add-image-watermark-artifact.title: Batch Add Image Watermark Artifact to Multiple PDFs
batch-add-image-watermark-artifact.description: Shows how to load a watermark image once and reuse it to add a semi‑transparent image watermark artifact to every page of several PDF documents, then save the watermarked files.

remove-screen-annotations-from-pdf.title: Remove Screen Annotations from PDF
remove-screen-annotations-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, finding all ScreenAnnotation objects on each page, deleting them, and saving the cleaned document.

create-link-annotation-named-destination.title: Create Link Annotation to a Named Destination
create-link-annotation-named-destination.description: Demonstrates how to add a clickable link annotation that jumps to a named destination defined later in the same PDF document using Aspose.PDF.

add-sound-annotation-plays-when-visible.title: Add Sound Annotation that Plays When Visible
add-sound-annotation-plays-when-visible.description: Demonstrates adding a SoundAnnotation to a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, linking an audio file and configuring it to play only when the annotation is visible on screen.

duplicate-watermark-annotations.title: Duplicate Watermark Annotations Across PDF Pages
duplicate-watermark-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to copy all WatermarkAnnotation objects from the first page of a PDF and add identical copies to each subsequent page using Aspose.Pdf.

create-3d-annotation-with-materials.title: Create 3D Annotation with Textures and Material Settings
create-3d-annotation-with-materials.description: Demonstrates embedding a 3D model into a PDF as a 3D annotation and configuring lighting, render mode, and material properties for realistic rendering using Aspose.Pdf.

toggle-watermark-visibility-button.title: Toggle Watermark Visibility with Button Annotation
toggle-watermark-visibility-button.description: Shows how to add a WatermarkArtifact to a PDF page and create a push‑button annotation that runs JavaScript to toggle the watermark's opacity on the current page.

change-pdf-annotation-colors-using-xfdf.title: Change PDF Annotation Colors Using XFDF Export/Import
change-pdf-annotation-colors-using-xfdf.description: The example exports annotations from a PDF to an XFDF file, modifies the color values in the XFDF XML, and then imports the updated annotations back into the PDF.

add-footer-watermark-annotations-to-pdf-.title: Add Footer Watermark Annotations to PDF Pages
add-footer-watermark-annotations-to-pdf-.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page, and adds a unique WatermarkAnnotation in the footer area before saving the modified document.

embed-pdf-portfolio-rich-media-disable-p.title: Embed PDF Portfolio as Rich Media and Disable Printing
embed-pdf-portfolio-rich-media-disable-p.description: Demonstrates how to create a RichMediaAnnotation that embeds a PDF portfolio into a PDF document and encrypts it to restrict printing permissions.

add-screen-annotation-external-video.title: Add Screen Annotation Linking to External Video
add-screen-annotation-external-video.description: Shows how to place a ScreenAnnotation on a PDF page that opens an external video URL when activated, using Aspose.Pdf.

increase-sound-annotation-clickable-area.title: Increase Clickable Area of Sound Annotations in PDF
increase-sound-annotation-clickable-area.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate all SoundAnnotation objects, and enlarge their rectangle by 10% (≈20% area increase) while keeping the annotation centered.

apply-pdf-pattern-tiled-watermark.title: Apply PDF Pattern as Tiled Watermark Across All Pages
apply-pdf-pattern-tiled-watermark.description: Shows how to use a PDF page as a tiled background watermark (WatermarkArtifact) on every page of a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf.

add-javascript-link-annotation-open-url.title: Add JavaScript Link Annotation to Open URL in New Window
add-javascript-link-annotation-open-url.description: Demonstrates how to add a link annotation with a JavaScript action that opens a specified URL in a new browser window using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-watermark-annotations-with-logo.title: Replace Watermark Annotations with Corporate Logo Image
replace-watermark-annotations-with-logo.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF pages, delete existing WatermarkAnnotation objects, and add a new image‑based WatermarkArtifact while preserving the original opacity and position.

add-3d-annotation-custom-camera.title: Add 3D Annotation with Custom Camera to PDF
add-3d-annotation-custom-camera.description: Shows how to embed a 3D model into a PDF as a 3D annotation and configure a custom camera view using Aspose.Pdf.

set-background-artifact-opacity-40.title: Set Background Artifact Opacity to 40% for Faded Effect
set-background-artifact-opacity-40.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over each page's artifacts, changes the opacity of BackgroundArtifact objects to 40%, and saves the modified document.

richmedia-annotation-mp4-video-poster.title: Create RichMedia Annotation with MP4 Video and Poster Image
richmedia-annotation-mp4-video-poster.description: Demonstrates how to add a RichMediaAnnotation to a PDF that embeds an MP4 video and shows a poster image before playback using Aspose.Pdf.

add-sound-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Sound Annotation to PDF Page
add-sound-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to add a SoundAnnotation that plays a voice‑over narration when the user clicks a defined region on page five of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-qr-code-watermark-to-pdf.title: Add QR Code Watermark to PDF
add-qr-code-watermark-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, adding a WatermarkArtifact that displays a QR code image, and positioning it at the top‑right corner using alignment and margins.

add-toggle-annotations-button.title: Add Toggle Annotations Button to PDF
add-toggle-annotations-button.description: Shows how to create a push button on a PDF page that executes JavaScript to toggle the hidden state of every annotation on the current page.

batch-add-sound-annotations-to-pdf-pages.title: Batch Add Sound Annotations to PDF Pages
batch-add-sound-annotations-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to loop through each page of a PDF and attach a unique sound annotation using a corresponding audio file.

extract-embedded-media-from-screenannota.title: Extract Embedded Media from ScreenAnnotation
extract-embedded-media-from-screenannota.description: Demonstrates how to locate ScreenAnnotation objects in a PDF, retrieve the embedded media via a GoToRemoteAction, and save the media stream to disk for further analysis.

add-readonly-rich-media-pdf-annotation.title: Add Read‑Only Rich Media PDF Annotation
add-readonly-rich-media-pdf-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to embed an external PDF as a rich‑media annotation in another PDF and configure the annotation to be read‑only by setting appropriate flags.

export-pdf-annotations-to-csv.title: Export PDF Annotations to CSV
export-pdf-annotations-to-csv.description: Loads a PDF document, iterates through each page and its annotations, and writes annotation details (type, rectangle, contents, title, color) to a CSV file for auditing.

button-highlight-text-fields.title: Create Button with JavaScript to Highlight Text Fields
button-highlight-text-fields.description: Demonstrates how to add a push‑button annotation to a PDF page and attach a JavaScript action that highlights all text fields on the current page.

add-tiled-high-res-pdf-background.title: Add Tiled High-Resolution PDF Background Using BackgroundArtifact
add-tiled-high-res-pdf-background.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's BackgroundArtifact to set a high‑resolution PDF page as a tiled background for a newly created PDF document.

set-link-annotation-border-color.title: Set Link Annotation Border Color to Red and Width to 3
set-link-annotation-border-color.description: The example loads a PDF, iterates through all pages and link annotations, and changes each link's border color to red with a width of three points before saving the document.

add-repeating-text-watermark-artifact.title: Add Repeating Text Watermark Artifact to PDF Pages
add-repeating-text-watermark-artifact.description: Demonstrates how to add a semi‑transparent, repeating "CONFIDENTIAL" text watermark across all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's WatermarkArtifact.

add-read-only-screen-annotation-swf.title: Add Read‑Only Screen Annotation with External SWF
add-read-only-screen-annotation-swf.description: Demonstrates how to embed an external SWF file as a ScreenAnnotation in a PDF and set it to read‑only to prevent user editing.

batch-import-xfdf-annotations-merge-pdfs.title: Batch Import XFDF Annotations and Merge PDFs
batch-import-xfdf-annotations-merge-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to import annotations from XFDF files into their matching PDFs and then merge all processed documents into a single PDF.

add-rich-media-video-annotation__v2.title: Add Rich Media Video Annotation to PDF
add-rich-media-video-annotation__v2.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a RichMediaAnnotation of type video, embedding an MP4 file, adding the annotation to the first page, and saving the result. Notes that double‑click activation is not supported by Aspose.PDF.

replace-pdf-page-background-images.title: Replace PDF Page Background Images
replace-pdf-page-background-images.description: Shows how to loop through PDF pages, find BackgroundArtifact objects, and replace their images while keeping the original positioning.

watermark-annotation-barcode-from-metada.title: Create Watermark Annotation with Barcode from Document Metadata
watermark-annotation-barcode-from-metada.description: Demonstrates how to generate a barcode image from PDF metadata and apply it as a semi‑transparent watermark annotation on the first page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-javascript-link-annotation-modal-dia.title: Add JavaScript Link Annotation to Show Modal Dialog
add-javascript-link-annotation-modal-dia.description: Demonstrates how to add a link annotation with a JavaScript action that displays a custom modal dialog in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-watermark-pdfs-page-count-opacity.title: Batch Watermark PDFs with Page‑Count Based Opacity
batch-watermark-pdfs-page-count-opacity.description: Shows how to process a folder of PDF files, calculate an opacity value from each document's page count, and add a background WatermarkArtifact to every page using Aspose.Pdf.

create-3d-annotation-realistic-lighting.title: Create 3D Annotation with Realistic Lighting
create-3d-annotation-realistic-lighting.description: Demonstrates embedding a U3D/PRC 3‑D model into a PDF as a 3‑D annotation using Aspose.Pdf, applying the Artwork lighting scheme and ShadedIllustration render mode to simulate realistic metal surface shading.

add-sound-annotation-to-pdf-page__v2.title: Add Sound Annotation to PDF Page
add-sound-annotation-to-pdf-page__v2.description: Demonstrates how to add a SoundAnnotation that plays a chime when a specific page becomes visible in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

clone-richmedia-annotations-summary-page.title: Clone RichMediaAnnotations to Summary Page
clone-richmedia-annotations-summary-page.description: Loads a PDF, adds a new summary page, clones all RichMediaAnnotation objects from existing pages (including visual properties and media content), and places the clones on the summary page.

add-js-button-export-annotations-json.title: Add JavaScript Button to Export Annotations as JSON
add-js-button-export-annotations-json.description: Demonstrates how to add a push‑button form field to a PDF and attach JavaScript that gathers all annotations, converts them to a JSON string, and shows the result.

add-diagonal-watermark-annotation.title: Add Diagonal Watermark Annotation to PDF
add-diagonal-watermark-annotation.description: Loads a PDF, creates a full‑page WatermarkAnnotation with semi‑transparent color, adds it to the first page, and saves the result. The annotation can be rotated later to appear diagonal across the page.

extract-embedded-media-from-richmedia-an.title: Extract Embedded Media from RichMedia Annotations
extract-embedded-media-from-richmedia-an.description: Demonstrates how to locate RichMedia annotations in a PDF and save their embedded audio/video streams to a structured folder hierarchy.

create-link-annotation-external-pdf-page.title: Create Link Annotation to Open an External PDF Page
create-link-annotation-external-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to add a link annotation that opens a specific page of an external PDF file when clicked.

add-animated-gif-screen-annotation.title: Add Animated GIF Screen Annotation to PDF Page
add-animated-gif-screen-annotation.description: Shows how to embed an animated GIF as a ScreenAnnotation on the third page of a PDF, making the animation loop continuously.

align-watermark-annotations-to-margins.title: Align Watermark Annotations to Page Margins
align-watermark-annotations-to-margins.description: Shows how to loop through PDF pages and reset the rectangle of each WatermarkAnnotation so it aligns uniformly with a specified page margin.

toggle-rich-media-visibility-button.title: Toggle Rich Media Annotation Visibility with a Button
toggle-rich-media-visibility-button.description: Demonstrates adding a RichMediaAnnotation and a button that toggles its visibility using HideAction on press and release events.

add-3d-annotation-front-view.title: Add 3D Annotation with Front View Rotation to PDF
add-3d-annotation-front-view.description: Demonstrates embedding a 3‑D model (U3D/PRC) into a PDF, creating a front‑view rotation, and adding a 3‑D annotation using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-replace-watermark-annotations.title: Batch Replace Watermark Annotations with Current Date
batch-replace-watermark-annotations.description: Iterates through all pages of a PDF, finds each WatermarkAnnotation, and replaces its text with a string that includes the current date. The updated PDF is then saved.

add-javascript-link-word-count.title: Add JavaScript Link Annotation for Word Count
add-javascript-link-word-count.description: Demonstrates how to add a link annotation that runs JavaScript to calculate and display the PDF's total word count.

add-auto-play-background-audio.title: Add Auto‑Play Background Audio with RichMediaAnnotation
add-auto-play-background-audio.description: Demonstrates how to embed an audio file in a PDF and configure a RichMediaAnnotation to play automatically when the page becomes visible.

gradient-background-pdf-backgroundartifa.title: Create PDF with Gradient Background using BackgroundArtifact
gradient-background-pdf-backgroundartifa.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF with a vertical gradient background by using a BackgroundArtifact and drawing a series of colored rectangles with Aspose.Pdf.

add-dynamic-page-number-watermark.title: Add Dynamic Page Number Watermark to PDF
add-dynamic-page-number-watermark.description: Shows how to create a WatermarkAnnotation that displays a page‑specific number on each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-pdf-portfolio-richmedia-annotation.title: Embed PDF Portfolio with RichMediaAnnotation
embed-pdf-portfolio-richmedia-annotation.description: Demonstrates adding a RichMediaAnnotation to a PDF that embeds another PDF portfolio and sets the initial view to the first file.

change-button-annotation-color-to-blue.title: Change Button Annotation Color to Blue
change-button-annotation-color-to-blue.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through all pages and annotations, changes the color of button fields to blue, and saves the updated file.

batch-add-video-screen-annotations.title: Batch Add Video Screen Annotations to PDF Pages
batch-add-video-screen-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to add a ScreenAnnotation containing a video file to every page of a PDF, calculating the annotation rectangle to preserve the video’s aspect ratio.
